methods.summary: Creates a blank Google Doc using document metadata such as title.
methods.follow_up: Use documents.batchUpdate to insert body content.

methods.summary: Retrieves the latest document structure and content visible to the caller.
methods.safety_use: Resolve structure, indexes, and revision information before batch updates.

methods.summary: Applies one or more update requests to a document in the order provided.

validation_rules: Each request must have exactly one Docs API request type and an object payload.
Text insertion requires payload.text and payload.location.index.
Range operations require payload.range.startIndex and payload.range.endIndex.
Table insertion requires positive rows and columns.
Batch updates require prior document inspection in this skill.
